proposals.title: Fix health check logic inconsistency in recordError
proposals.rationale: In `recordSuccess`, the health check allows `lastErrorTime === 0` (no errors yet) to be healthy, but `recordError` always sets `lastErrorTime = Date.now()` before the check, so the `> 30000` condition is always false immediately after an error. More critically, `recordError` omits the `lastErrorTime === 0` fallback that `recordSuccess` has, creating an inconsistency. The real bug is that a single error immediately marks a provider unhealthy regardless of error rate, since `Date.now() - m.lastErrorTime` will be ~0. The health check should primarily rely on error rate, with a cooldown only for recently-errored providers.

proposals.title: Improve readability by consolidating workspace directory logic
proposals.rationale: The getWorkspaceDir function duplicates the logic for resolving the server directory and creating the workspace, which is already handled in getServerDir. By reusing getServerDir, the code becomes more readable and maintainable, reducing redundancy.

proposals.title: Consolidate workspace directory logic
proposals.rationale: The workspace directory resolution logic is duplicated across getWorkspaceDir and getServerDir, and the caching is inconsistent. Consolidating into a single function with clear caching improves readability and reduces maintenance burden.
